overview: A vibrant street food ordering website for Chaat Paglu where customers browse the menu, add items to a cart, place orders, and share feedback — no login needed.
features: Browse 6 street food items with prices and half/full variants
Shopping cart with quantity controls and live subtotal
Order checkout with name and phone fields
Order confirmation with unique reference number
Post-order star rating and feedback form
Vibrant saffron, orange, and red street vendor design
